# RAPP Messaging

- Spec: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/rapp-messaging/main/SPEC.md
- iMessage profile: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/rapp-messaging/main/IMESSAGE.md
- Registry: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/rapp-messaging/main/registry.json
- Conformance vectors: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/rapp-messaging/main/vectors/conformance.json

Core rule: retain full private context locally; project only authorized,
relevant memory into the current conversation. This is a profile over the
existing RAPP wire, not a new endpoint.
